name: NHL Hockey
description: The National Hockey League — Stanley Cup, legends, and rivalries

questions.q: The annual championship trophy of the NHL is called the...?

source.notes: First awarded 1893. Named after Lord Stanley of Preston, then Governor General of Canada.

questions.q: Which NHL team has won the most Stanley Cup championships?

source.notes: 24 Stanley Cups through 2024. Toronto Maple Leafs are second with 13.

questions.q: Who holds the NHL record for most career goals, points, and assists?

source.notes: 'The Great One.' 894 goals, 1,963 assists, 2,857 points — all NHL records. Four-time Stanley Cup champion.

questions.q: How long is a major penalty in the NHL?

source.notes: Minor penalty is 2 minutes. Misconduct is 10 minutes. Game misconduct ejects for the game.

questions.q: How many players from each team are on the ice during normal play in the NHL?

source.notes: 1 goaltender + 5 skaters. Teams pull the goalie late in games to add an attacker.

questions.q: Gary Bettman, the NHL commissioner since 1993, held what prior position?

source.notes: NBA Senior VP and General Counsel before joining NHL. Longest-tenured commissioner in NHL history.

questions.q: What is the thick rubber disc used in hockey called?

source.notes: Often slang'd 'biscuit' ('biscuit in the basket' = goal). 3 inches diameter, 1 inch thick, 6 oz.

questions.q: What is the Lady Byng Memorial Trophy awarded for in the NHL?

source.notes: Awarded since 1925. Named after Lady Byng, wife of Canada's Governor General.

questions.q: The Hart Memorial Trophy is awarded each year to the NHL's...?

source.notes: MVP award since 1924. Named after Dr. David Hart, father of ex-Canadiens GM.

questions.q: How many periods are in a regulation NHL game?

source.notes: 3 periods of 20 minutes each. 60 minutes total. Followed by overtime if tied.

questions.q: What is a 'hat trick' in hockey?

source.notes: Fans traditionally throw hats onto the ice. Originated from a British haberdasher's offer.

questions.q: Which Canadian city hosts the NHL's Hockey Hall of Fame?

source.notes: Moved to Toronto in 1961. Houses the Stanley Cup between championship seasons.

questions.q: Which Russian superstar has scored more NHL goals than anyone else except Gretzky?

source.notes: Ovechkin passed Gretzky's career goal record of 894 in 2025.

questions.q: Which team did the Anaheim Ducks defeat to win their only Stanley Cup in 2007?

source.notes: Anaheim Ducks (previously 'Mighty Ducks') won 4-1 in the finals.

questions.q: What is the name of the trophy awarded to the NHL team that wins the Eastern Conference playoffs?

source.notes: Western Conference winner gets the Campbell Bowl. Both are pre-Stanley Cup finals prizes.

questions.q: Approximately how much does the original Stanley Cup trophy weigh?

source.notes: 34.5 lbs. Made of silver and nickel alloy. ~35 inches tall.

questions.q: How many NHL teams are there (as of 2024)?

source.notes: Last expansion: Seattle Kraken (2021). 25 US teams, 7 Canadian teams.

questions.q: Which former NHL player was named one of Canada's greatest athletes and has the number 99 retired league-wide?

source.notes: Number 99 retired league-wide in 2000 — only jersey number in NHL history to receive this honor.

questions.q: What is the NHL trophy awarded to the playoff MVP called?

source.notes: Named after Conn Smythe, founder of the Toronto Maple Leafs. First awarded 1965.

questions.q: Which team beat the Vegas Golden Knights in their Stanley Cup debut in 2018?

source.notes: First Cup for the Capitals. Alex Ovechkin finally ended his long championship drought.
